title: lasiobema roxburghianum
intro: Lasiobema roxburghianum, also known as Roxburgh's Bristle Grass or Lasiobema, is a species of grass native to the tropical regions of the world. It is a type of grass used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties that aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antispasmodic. The plant is rich in health benefits, including relieving gastrointestinal issues, reducing fever, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Lasiobema roxburghianum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
